---
title: ButtonsMobile
subtitle: "keept'em slim"
---

> Buttons from Naked to Bootstrap styling

```{=html}

<div class="container-fluid d-flex flex-column w-100 p-3">
  
  <div class="d-flex align-items-stretch w-100 mb-2">
  
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <div class="input-group h-100">
        <span class="input-group-text bg-light">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
        </span>
        <input 
          id="search-input"
          type="text" 
          class="form-control form-control-lg" 
          placeholder="Type to echo..." 
          bind:value={inputValue}
        />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-primary w-100 h-100" 
        type="button"
        >
        <i class="bi bi-folder-plus me-1 d-none d-md-flex"></i>
        ADD</button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-warning w-100  h-100" 
        type="button"
        on:click={handleClip}
        disabled={!inputValue}
      >
        <i class="bi bi-clipboard me-1 d-none d-md-flex"></i>
        CLIP
      </button>
    </div>
    
    <div class="flex-fill px-1">
      <button 
        class="btn btn-danger w-100  h-100" 
        type="button" 
        on:click={handleRaz}
      >
        <i class="bi bi-eraser me-1 d-none d-md-flex"></i>
        RAZ
      </button>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

```
